title: Rename Elytra
body:
Read file "ReadMe.txt" in the archive
This resource pack will help you rename elytras to get different types of elytras, if you rename a carved pumpkin, then cloaks, with it you will be able to fly on elytras that you could not get for some reason Use the CIT Resewn mod for fabric, forge CIT Reforged or Optifine

This may be useful to you if you wanted to have elytra and/or a cloak, which for some reason you could not get, also a plus 
This resource pack is that, unlike other elytra resource packs, it does not replace the elytra of all players and you can choose which elytra or cloak you will wear

If you have other cloak textures, or elytra, or an idea for a new elytra, write to my discord server!
